subcodes.first_line: O Divine friends! At this moment the illustrious letter was read, and I became occupied with thoughts of you. The Lord of all the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی الان نامه نامی قرائت گردید بیاد شما مشغول شدم خداوند عالمیان در
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @thankfulness; gratitude
